content.en:
"Mangu Domain Ancestor has fallen!!"

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor and the Black Scale Domain Ancestor were extremely frightened.

The Mangu Domain Ancestor has fallen, can they still hold on?

Now, they could only hope that Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor and they would be able to break the Five Elements Ban, and when the time came, with the strength of their many four-star kings, they would be able to defeat or even kill Ye Tian.

Otherwise, they would have fallen and died today.

At this moment, Ye Tian made a move against the Black Scale Domain Ancestor.

I saw Ye Tian use the Void Escape Saint Technique to appear beside the Black Scale Domain Ancestor, and immediately used the Extreme Saint Technique, a holy technique that specializes in breaking defenses, to penetrate the Black Scale Domain Ancestor with one blow.

The terrifying power of the Holy Technique exploded in the body of the Black Scale Domain Ancestor, causing the Black Scale Domain Ancestor to be seriously injured in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian strangled the Black Scale Domain Ancestor again and again with the False Slashing Holy Technique.

In the blink of an eye, the Black Scale Domain Ancestor fell and died.

All this was so fast that even the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor couldn't react.

He constantly turned into thunder and shuttled through this void, trying to avoid Ye Tian, but he couldn't.

And the four-star kings such as the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor outside were in a hurry, and frantically attacked the Five Elements Ban.

At this time, the Five Elements Forbidden had already appeared countless cracks, and they were about to shatter, but even if they were delayed for a while, the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor might fall.

Burst!!!

With a single blow, the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor used a secret treasure to forcibly burst out of speed, evade the vital point, and only one arm was cut off, and the injury was not serious.

Abruptly.

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor screamed in pain, it turned out that his soul had been severely damaged by Ye Tian's Zhen Divine Technique again.

It was at this time that the Five Elements Prohibition was finally shattered by the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestors.

And Ye Tian didn't care about it, and directly bombarded the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor with all his strength.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, stop!"

Yuanfeng Yuzu said angrily.

Many of their four-star domain ancestors shot out in unison and bombarded Ye Tian, trying to stop Ye Tian with their attacks.

If Ye Tian continued to attack, he would inevitably be hit by the attacks of all of them, and he would be injured or even severely injured.

However, what they didn't expect was that Ye Tian ignored it and still attacked the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor.

Burst!!!!

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor was pierced by Ye Tian's Space Saint Technique, and he was already seriously injured, and he could no longer survive, and was directly killed.

And the attack of Yuanfeng Yuzu and others also fell on Ye Tian's body.

Rumble!!!!!

The place where Ye Tian was was annihilated again and again, and Ye Tian tore through the void and rushed out of this place of annihilation.

At this time, the Golden Body Saint Technique and the Holy Armor Saint Technique on Ye Tian's body were all shattered, and even the Holy Artifact Jin Chen Armor on his body was a little cracked, I am afraid that it would take a long time to repair it.

Moreover, Ye Tian was indeed injured.

"Indestructible!"

The Immortal Saint Technique of the Extreme Realm was operating, and this injury quickly recovered.

"Immortal Sacred Technique !!! of the Extreme Realm"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor's pupils shrank.

Originally, Ye Tian had two Extreme Realm Defensive Saint Techniques, which were already very difficult to kill, and if they were coupled with the Extreme Realm Immortal Saint Technique, it would be even more difficult to kill.

The full force of their six four-star kings just now failed to hit Ye Tian hard, this is the best explanation!

At this moment, the hearts of the six four-star kings were completely bottomless.

"He doesn't have much soul holy light, and there is absolutely no way to fight for a long time, once his soul holy light is exhausted, it will not be difficult to kill him! Moreover, the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor is also coming, once he comes, we will have a greater chance of killing the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor said.

"Yes!"

The other five four-star kings are full of confidence.

Rumble!!!!!

The six four-star kings made a move towards Ye Tian, and one by one they were all holy techniques or top domain techniques of the extreme realm.

One person fought against the six four-star kings, and among them, there was also a top four-star king with the power of the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, and Ye Tian's pressure was actually quite great.

Just as the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor said in the message, Ye Tian would not be able to fight for a long time, otherwise if the soul holy light was exhausted, his combat effectiveness would be greatly reduced.

So, he must settle the battle as soon as possible.

"Eternal Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian urged this holy technique to freeze time in an instant.

The six four-star kings were fixed one after another, but Ye Tian did not make a move against the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor, the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor was very powerful, even if it was fixed, it would soon break the time, so even if he made a move on him, the damage would not be great, and he would not be able to hit him hard.

He needs to kill a few four-star kings to relieve the pressure.

And the Eternal Sacred Technique is a great assistance to the battle, but the consumption is also very large, and there is no way to use the Eternal Sacred Technique all the time, otherwise, he will keep using the Eternal Sacred Technique and freeze the time eternally, so what's the point?

"Void Slash Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian slashed at a weaker four-star king with all his strength, and the blow penetrated and seriously injured him.

Then, with a wave of his hand, countless golden wires cut towards the six four-star kings.

This is Ye Tian's Golden Silk Holy Technique!

The Golden Silk Skill is weaker than the Void Slash Technique, but it can attack multiple people at the same time.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the Streamer Holy Technique, exerting his speed to the extreme, and from time to time he also used the Empty Escape Holy Technique, so that the six four-star kings could not hurt Ye Tian at all.

Burst!

Another Void Slash Saint Technique slammed into the seriously injured four-star king, hitting him again.

"Protect the Ironwood Domain Ancestor!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestral Road.

However, who would dare to withstand Ye Tian's Void Slashing Saint Technique?

"Tiemu Domain Ancestor, you hide in the branch and withdraw from the battle!"

Seeing this, Yuanfeng Yuzu proposed.

"Good!"

The Ironwood Ancestor tried to escape into the Thunder Island Division as fast as he could.

Once he entered the Thunder Island Branch, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength was, he would not be able to break in.

However, Ye Tian did not intend to let go of the Tiemu Domain Ancestor, and used the Void Escape Saint Technique to stop the Tiemu Domain Ancestor in an instant.

Immediately, Ye Tian pressed one hand towards the Iron Wood Domain Ancestor.

"Five Elements Ban!"

This holy skill can both seal the void and seal the enemy's cultivation.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian slammed his palm on the body of the Tiemu Domain Ancestor, and the power of the Five Elements Forbidden turned into an incomparably mysterious prohibition, sealing most of the power of the Iron Wood Domain Ancestor.

"Close!"

Ye Tian easily took the Iron Wood Domain Ancestor into the inner world and suppressed it.

"Hurry up and let go of the Iron Wood Domain Ancestor!"

Yuanfeng Yuzu said angrily.

However, not long after the Iron Wood Domain Ancestor entered Ye Tian's inner world, he was suppressed and died.

At this moment, Yuanfeng Yuzu and others sensed it.

The Ancestor of the Ironwood Domain has fallen and died!

The Lei Gang Domain Ancestor who was watching the battle from the sidelines was full of anger, how long has it been, and the Ghost Fox Organization has fallen four four-star kings, plus the two four-star kings who fell in the Xuanxu Saint Realm before, that is a full six four-star kings!

After endless years, the Ghost Fox Organization has accumulated such a few four-star kings, and now it has fallen by almost half.

"We must kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor at all costs!"

Lei Gang Yu Ancestor gritted his teeth and said.
